title: Assoc. Prof. Ahu Gökçe Receives TÜBİTAK 3005 Project Grant

Assoc. Prof. Ahu Gökçe Receives TÜBİTAK 3005 Project Grant

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project coordinated by

Assoc. Prof. Ahu Gökçe

from the Department of Psychology and entitled “Norm Study on Food Stimuli” has been funded by

TUBİTAK 3005 – Social Sciences and Humanities Program.

We congratulate our faculty member for her achievement and wish for the continuation of her success.
